title: Troubleshooting kubeadm — ebtablesor some similar executable not found during installation
text:
If you see the following warnings while running
kubeadm init
[preflight] WARNING: ebtables not found in system path
[preflight] WARNING: ethtool not found in system path
Then you may be missing
ebtables
,
ethtool
or a similar executable on your node.
You can install them with the following commands:
For Ubuntu/Debian users, run
apt install ebtables ethtool
.
For CentOS/Fedora users, run
yum install ebtables ethtool
.
